Based on the zoomed-in view of atom index 7 (N), I can clearly see the covalent bonds connecting it to its neighboring atoms.

**geomconf_index:** 9158

The nitrogen atom (N:7) is part of a ring structure and is covalently bonded to two carbon atoms (C:1 and C:6).

question: Please find neighbour atoms of atom index 7 (element: N). Neighbour atoms are covalently connected. Report their atomic indices and elements. Also return the geomconf_index.
